# Aaron Mompié — Personal Brand Site

> Astro 5 static site and personal brand for Aaron Mompié, a software engineer and writer. Features a scroll-snap homepage with hero, image carousel, featured blog posts, and an about section. Blog content is authored in Markdown/MDX using Astro content collections.

The site is built with Astro's file-based routing, Tailwind CSS (via the Vite plugin), and hand-written CSS with custom properties for design tokens. It uses view transitions (`ClientRouter`), hover-based prefetching, and CSS entrance animations with scroll-reveal. The homepage displays up to three featured blog posts sorted by publish date.

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): Project overview, folder structure, and available commands
- [Copilot Instructions](.github/copilot-instructions.md): Architecture guide, conventions, animation patterns, and styling approach

## Configuration

- [Astro Config](astro.config.mjs): Site URL, prefetch strategy, MDX and sitemap integrations, Tailwind Vite plugin
- [Content Config](src/content.config.ts): Blog collection schema — title, description, pubDate, heroImage, draft flag
- [Constants](src/consts.ts): Site-wide copy, social links, and feature flags (e.g. carousel toggle)
- [TypeScript Config](tsconfig.json): TypeScript compiler settings
- [Package Manifest](package.json): Dependencies and npm scripts (dev, build, preview)

## Pages & Layouts

- [Homepage](src/pages/index.astro): Scroll-snap landing page with hero, carousel, featured blog strip, and about section
- [Blog Index](src/pages/blog/index.astro): Lists all published posts sorted by date
- [Blog Post Route](src/pages/blog/[...slug].astro): Dynamic route rendering individual blog posts via getStaticPaths
- [About Page](src/pages/about.astro): About page reusing the BlogPost layout
- [RSS Feed](src/pages/rss.xml.js): RSS feed generated from the blog collection
- [Blog Post Layout](src/layouts/BlogPost.astro): Shared article layout for blog posts
- [Page Layout](src/layouts/Page.astro): General page layout

## Components

- [BaseHead](src/components/BaseHead.astro): SEO/OG metadata, global CSS import, view transitions, Google Fonts
- [Header](src/components/Header.astro): Site header with transition:persist for view transition continuity
- [HeaderLink](src/components/HeaderLink.astro): Navigation link with active-state detection
- [Footer](src/components/Footer.astro): Site footer
- [FormattedDate](src/components/FormattedDate.astro): Date formatting utility component

## Styles

- [Global Stylesheet](src/styles/global.css): Tailwind import, CSS custom properties (design tokens), entrance animations, scroll-reveal, and prefers-reduced-motion overrides

## Blog Content

- [Markdown Style Guide](src/content/blog/markdown-style-guide.md): Sample post demonstrating Markdown syntax
- [Using MDX](src/content/blog/using-mdx.mdx): Sample post demonstrating MDX integration

## Optional

- [Robots.txt](public/robots.txt): Crawler access rules
- [TypeScript Instructions](.github/instructions/typescript-5-es2022.instructions.md): TypeScript coding conventions and guardrails
